products.name: Nespresso

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo’s 2025 test lists Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top capsule brands, citing quality and price. The evidence is older than 60 days.
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
